sys_script_client.description:
v2.6 STRY0091379 - FLDS/PRMs - Update the Fields and Permissions logic to streamline the client script and remove flicker
v 2.5.3 STRY0083372 - STRETCH- FLDS: "Assigned Member" field must be editable on "New" sub task form. STRY0085187 - RESPONSE/REVIEWER - Standard Task form - Review Required flag and Reviewer field as Task Owner STRY0085438 - FIX: Javascript error on new "Modals" - this was due to AJAX calls in modal windows which is not allowed. Used Scratch Pad to remove AJAX calls in Onload. STRY0085338 - UI MODAL - (Portal & Platform) Modal for Send to Review - Response Comments - "Reviewer" field Read-Only STRY0074111 - RESPONSE/REVIEWER - Task Form - latest "Response Comment" displays on Task form when populated on Send to Review Modal STRY0085538 - RESPONSE/REVIEWER - Task Form - latest "Rework Comments" displays on Task form when populated on Send to Rework Modal 2.5.316 - RJ - Adjust Read Only settings into Permissions 2.5.321 - STRY0088985 - Platform - Reopen a Task on Platform redirects to the latest Platform page accessed v 2.5.13: KT - FLDS - STRY0063495 - Updated Reqs on Top TAA: Change to Edit : 08.01.20
v 2.5.27: KT - Rework JS Error
sys_script_client.name: DEPRECATED - Task - Patch Permissions
